name: fiat-luxia
description: Restores light to the dark corners of the web
author: Diogo Eichert

scripts.build: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:generic
scripts.build:firefox: zip -jr - content.js icon.png popup.html popup.js build/manifest.json > dist/${PWD##*/}-firefox-${npm_package_version}.zip
scripts.build:generic: zip -jr - content.js icon.png popup.html popup.js build/manifest.json > dist/${PWD##*/}-generic-${npm_package_version}.zip
